prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large purple metal sphere
  - obj_1: large red metal cylinder
  - obj_2: small green metal cube
  - obj_3: large cyan metal cylinder
  - obj_4: small green rubber cube
  - obj_5: large cyan rubber sphere
  - obj_6: small yellow rubber cube
  - obj_7: large blue metal cylinder
  - obj_8: small blue metal cube

Questions:
[qrr_0141] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0142] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0143] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0144] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0145] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0146] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0147] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0148] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0149] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0150] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0151] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0152] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0153] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0154] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0155] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0156] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0157] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0158] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0159] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0160] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D distances between objects in each image. Let me carefully examine each image and the objects listed.

Looking at the last image (which appears to be the one with objects obj_0 through obj_8 as listed):
- obj_0: large purple metal sphere
- obj_1: large red metal cylinder
- obj_2: small green metal cube
- obj_3: large cyan metal cylinder
- obj_4: small green rubber cube
- obj_5: large cyan rubber sphere
- obj_6: small yellow rubber cube
- obj_7: large blue metal cylinder
- obj_8: small blue metal cube

Let me estimate positions from the last image:
- obj_0 (purple sphere): front-center area
- obj_1 (red cylinder): back-left
- obj_2 (green metal cube): left side
- obj_3 (cyan cylinder): back-right area
- obj_4 (green rubber cube): center-right
- obj_5 (cyan rubber sphere): center-front
- obj_6 (yellow cube): front-center
- obj_7 (blue cylinder): left-center
- obj_8 (blue metal cube): right side

Now let me estimate distances:

obj_0 to obj_8: purple sphere to blue cube - moderate distance
obj_2 to obj_3: green metal cube to cyan cylinder - fairly large distance
obj_2 to obj_4: green metal cube to green rubber cube - moderate
obj_2 to obj_5: green metal cube to cyan sphere - moderate-large
obj_2 to obj_6: green metal cube to yellow cube - large distance
obj_2 to obj_7: green metal cube to blue cylinder - moderate
obj_3 to obj_4: cyan cylinder to green rubber cube - small-moderate
obj_3 to obj_5: cyan cylinder to cyan sphere - large
obj_3 to obj_6: cyan cylinder to yellow cube - very large
obj_3 to obj_7: cyan cylinder to blue cylinder - moderate
obj_3 to obj_8: cyan cylinder to blue cube - moderate
obj_4 to obj_5: green rubber to cyan sphere - moderate
obj_4 to obj_6: green rubber to yellow cube - large
obj_4 to obj_7: green rubber to blue cylinder - moderate
obj_5 to obj_6: cyan sphere to yellow cube - small
obj_5 to obj_7: cyan sphere to blue cylinder - moderate
obj_6 to obj_7: yellow cube to blue cylinder - large
obj_1 to obj_2: red cylinder to green metal cube - large
obj_3 to obj_4: moderate
obj_3 to obj_5: large
obj_3 to obj_7: moderate
obj_3 to obj_8: moderate
obj_4 to obj_5: moderate
